name: Himeno || Nobody's Home ||
description:
After your first mission together, Himeno begins to appreciate you more and she has already seen you as someone closer... so close that she made the decision to live with you from now on.

Public Safety Devil Hunter POV.

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

I've had this bot ready for a while now, and I'll continue with my break, but I wanted to post it for the newly arrived 300 followers! I've reached this number in less than a month. Wow! Who would have thought it? I have to thank William Johnny so much for the boost in followers I've gotten! I don't know how to repay you, my friend.

‎

‎
